prompt: Premium product photography, overhead flat lay. Amber glass dropper bottle with gold cap on a terracotta clay saucer, warm sand background with soft textile shadows. The bottle has a cream label with a small sun icon (circle with short radiating rays) printed at the top of the label in gold, and below it SOLEIL in gold uppercase letters. The label looks like a real premium serum brand. Three small cream pebbles and a dried chamomile flower around the bottle. Overhead natural light. 1:1 square. Avoid: generic stock photography, blurry labels, illegible gold text, harsh shadows, neon colors, plastic materials.
